title: Outcomes versus intentions: Measuring migration based on travel histories | Stats NZ
content:
## Outcomes versus intentions: Measuring migration based on travel histories
31 August 2017, 10:45am
Outcomes versus intentions introduces a new measure of migration based on the travel histories of people crossing the border into and out of New Zealand.
It provides a brief introduction to measuring migration, extends the time series that use the new measure, and adds insight into how migration outcomes compare with people’s intentions as they cross the border.
Defining migrants using travel histories and the '12/16-month rule' introduces the new measure.
- Outcomes versus intentions: Measuring migration based on travel histories Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 456 KB
